revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Person | Name=Amirhosein Jafari | Guid=3040-193121 | Gender=Male | Birthday=2005-03-21 | Website=http://www.amirhoseinjafari2005.blogfa.com | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Lucky_Luke_End_of_Legend_The_Official_Game | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/191/1916125/3680539-img_%DB%B2%DB%B0%DB%B2%DB%B4%DB%B1%DB%B2%DB%B2%DB%B9_%DB%B1%DB%B6%DB%B4%DB%B0%DB%B2%DB%B6.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3680539-img_\u06f2\u06f0\u06f2\u06f4\u06f1\u06f2\u06f2\u06f9_\u06f1\u06f6\u06f4\u06f0\u06f2\u06f6.jpg","path":"191\/1916125\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_large,square_avatar,screen_medium","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> Amirhossein Jafari, known as Amir Jafari is a director, editor and writer from Iran. He became famous for making short films adapted from comic books. He has been working since 2018. apart from filmmaking, he has a history of writing and criticizing movies, and at least more than 80 articles have been published by him. His artistic activity is not limited to directing, and his portfolio also includes painting and photography.

{{Person | Name=Ben Starr | Guid=3040-193069 | Aliases=Ben Star | Deck=Ben Starr is an English actor who is best known for his role as the protagonist in Final Fantasy XVI. | Gender=Male | Birthday=1988-04-01 | Hometown=Bristol | Twitter=The_Ben_Starr | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/A_Way_Out,Games/Arknights,Games/Clair_Obscur_Expedition_33,Games/Company_of_Heroes_2,Games/Date_Everything,Games/Final_Fantasy_XVI,Games/Hades_II,Games/Quantum_Break,Games/Warframe | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3662847-1192843304-he-di.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3662847-1192843304-he-di.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_mini,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_tiny,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium,square_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Ben Starr is an English actor who is best known for his role as the protagonist in Final Fantasy XVI.
